Results

Click on the > button to view corresponding match page. Please note that you can click on teams, players, referees and venues in the list below, but the link colour has been removed in order to improve readability.

>  Cronulla 24 (V. Holmes 2, S. Katoa, M. Moylan tries; C. Townsend 4 goals) defeated Penrith 12 (W. Blake, C. Harawira-Naera tries; J. Luai 2 goals) at Panthers Stadium.
Date: Fri, 13th July.   Kickoff: 6:00 PM.   Halftime: Cronulla 12-2.   Referees: Matt Cecchin, Phil Henderson.   Crowd: 11,742.
Penrith: Aekins, Crichton, Blake, Whare, Phillips; May, Luai; Merrin (C), Katoa, Tamou, Kikau, Yeo, Fisher-Harris. Int: Egan, Harawira-Naera, Hetherington, Leota.
Cronulla: Holmes, Katoa, Capewell, Leutele, Lee; Moylan, Townsend; Fifita, Brailey, Prior, Sorensen, Graham (C), Gallen (C). Int: Paulo, Segeyaro, Woods, Bukuya.
>  Newcastle 18 (S. Kenny-Dowall, M. Pearce, C. Watson tries; K. Sio 3 goals) defeated Parramatta 16 (M. Moses, C. Norman, S. Vave tries; C. Gutherson 2 goals) at McDonald Jones Stadium.
Date: Fri, 13th July.   Kickoff: 7:50 PM.   Halftime: 10-all.   Referees: Tim Roby, Adam Gee.   Crowd: 15,860.
Newcastle: Meaney, Sio, Mata'utia, Denniss, Kenny-Dowall; Watson, Pearce (C); King, Levi, Saifiti, Barnett, Guerra, Ese'ese. Int: Ross, Heighington, Buhrer, Lillyman.
Parramatta: Gutherson (C), French, Jennings, Hayne, Jennings; Norman, Moses; Alvaro, King, Vave, Niukore, Takairangi, Brown. Int: Moeroa, Mannah, Gower, Terepo.
>  South Sydney 24 (R. Jennings 3, A. Reynolds tries; A. Reynolds 4 goals) defeated Canterbury 6 (R. Smith try; R. Martin goal) at ANZ Stadium.
Date: Sat, 14th July.   Kickoff: 3:00 PM.   Halftime: South Sydney 12-2.   Referees: Gavin Badger, Peter Gough.   Crowd: 14,278.
Canterbury: Hopoate, Morris, Morris, Holland, Smith; Lewis, Marshall-King; Tolman, Lichaa, Klemmer, Jackson (C), Martin, Elliott. Int: Brown, Priest, Ogden, Fualalo.
South Sydney: Johnston, Graham, Hunt, Gagai, Jennings; Walker, Reynolds; Burgess, Cook, Burgess, Sutton, Crichton, Burgess (C). Int: Doueihi, Murray, Nicholls, Tatola.
>  Melbourne 14 (B. Croft, S. Vunivalu tries; C. Smith 3 goals) defeated Manly 13 (S. Lane 2 tries; D. Cherry-Evans 2 goals; D. Cherry-Evans field goal) at Lottoland.
Date: Sat, 14th July.   Kickoff: 5:30 PM.   Halftime: Manly 13-6.   Referees: Gavin Reynolds, Chris Sutton.   Crowd: 9,277.
Manly: Trbojevic, Wright, Suli, Kelly, Parker; Wright, Cherry-Evans (C); Fonua-Blake, Fainu, Taupau, Thompson, Lane, Trbojevic. Int: Hodkinson, Tanginoa, Winterstein, Paseka.
Melbourne: Hughes, Vunivalu, Blair, Scott, Tonumaipe'a; Jacks, Croft; Welch, Smith (C), Asofa-Solomona, Stimson, Hoffman, Bromwich. Int: Smith, Bromwich, Glasby, Kamikamica.
>  Canberra 38 (M. Oldfield 3, J. Rapana 2, B. Austin, A. Sezer tries; A. Sezer 5 goals) defeated North Qld 12 (G. Cooper, L. Coote tries; J. Thurston 2 goals) at GIO Stadium.
Date: Sat, 14th July.   Kickoff: 7:30 PM.   Halftime: Canberra 14-12.   Referees: Henry Perenara, Liam Kennedy.   Crowd: 11,471.
Canberra: Cotric, Oldfield, Croker (C), Leilua, Rapana; Williams, Sezer; Lui, Hodgson, Paulo, Soliola, Whitehead, Papalii. Int: Austin, Bateman, Havili, Knight.
North Qld: Coote, Feldt, Tuala, Linnett, Winterstein; Martin, Thurston (C); Asiata, Granville, Bolton, Cooper, Wright, Taumalolo. Int: Hess, Hampton, Fensom, Jensen.
>  Warriors 26 (S. Kata 2, G. Beale, I. Luke, A. Paasi tries; S. Johnson 3 goals) defeated Brisbane 6 (A. McCullough try; J. Isaako goal) at Suncorp Stadium.
Date: Sun, 15th July.   Kickoff: 2:00 PM.   Halftime: Warriors 16-0.   Referees: Grant Atkins, Matt Noyen.   Crowd: 37,493.
Brisbane: Boyd (C), Oates, Su'A, Kahu, Isaako; Milford, Nikorima; Lodge, McCullough, Thaiday, Glenn, Fifita, McGuire. Int: Staggs, Ofahengaue, Sims, Mago.
Warriors: Tuivasa-Sheck (C), Fusitu'a, Hiku, Kata, Beale; Green, Johnson; Gavet, Luke, Paasi, Papali'i, Mannering, Blair. Int: Tevaga, Satae, Vuna, Gelling.
>  Wests Tigers 20 (L. Brooks, D. Nofoaluma, C. Thompson tries; E. Marsters 4 goals) defeated St Geo Illa 16 (M. Dufty, B. Hunt, G. Widdop tries; G. Widdop 2 goals) at Jubilee Stadium.
Date: Sun, 15th July.   Kickoff: 4:10 PM.   Halftime: 6-all.   Referees: Ben Cummins, Ziggy Przeklasa-Adamski.   Crowd: 15,992.
St Geo Illa: Dufty, Macdonald, Aitken, Lafai, Nightingale; Widdop (C), Hunt; Graham, McInnes, Vaughan, Frizell, Sims, De Belin. Int: Latimore, Mann, Ah Mau, Leilua.
Wests Tigers: Mbye, Nofoaluma, Marsters, Naiqama, Thompson; Marshall, Brooks; Packer, Farah, Matulino, Lawrence (C), Aloiai, Taylor. Int: Sue, Chee-Kam, Eisenhuth, Garner.
>  Sydney 20 (P. Fa'amausili, P. Momirovski, S. O'Sullivan tries; S. Taukeiaho 3, B. Ferguson goals) defeated Gold Coast 12 (M. Fotuaika, J. Wallace tries; M. Gordon 2 goals) at Cbus Super Stadium.
Date: Sun, 15th July.   Kickoff: 6:30 PM.   Halftime: Sydney 14-6.   Referees: Chris Butler, Jon Stone.   Crowd: 10,074.
Gold Coast: Gordon, Don, Hurrell, Lee, Sami; Brimson, Taylor; Fotuaika, Peats, James (C), Proctor, Matthews, Wallace. Int: Rein, Stockwell, Latu, Whitbread.
Sydney: Ferguson, Tupou, Momirovski, Manu, Ikuvalu; Keary, O'Sullivan; Waerea-Hargreaves, Friend (C), Taukeiaho, Matterson, Butcher, Liu. Int: Tetevano, Collins, Baptiste, Fa'amausili.
